notes: HAR-767 captures giftCardCreate initialValue validation against giftCardConfiguration.issueLimit.
The captured shop issue limit is 3000.0 CAD; boundary uses the exact limit, overByCent adds $0.01, and wellOver uses 1000000.0.
The boundary success gift card is deactivated during cleanup. Rejected branches should not create gift-card records.
